creator: olevole@yandex.ru
text:
URL for source repository is wrong

[root@home /usr/ports/x11-fonts/mathfonts]# make
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> MathFonts_TrueType_41.exe doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/mathfonts-4.1.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://support.wolfram.com/mathematica/systems/windows/general/files/.
fetch: http://support.wolfram.com/mathematica/systems/windows/general/files/MathFonts_TrueType_41.exe: Moved Permanently
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/mathfonts-4.1/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/mathfonts-4.1/MathFonts_TrueType_41.exe: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/mathfonts-4.1 and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-fonts/mathfonts.

Fix: 

http://support.wolfram.com/technotes/latestfonts.en.html
How-To-Repeat: portsnap fetch [extract | update ]
cd /usr/ports/x11-fonts/mathfonts
make fetch
